title: A Genomewide Mutagenesis Screen Identifies Multiple Genes Contributing to Vi Capsular Expression in Salmonella enterica Serovar Typhi
summary: The paper describes ViII bacteriophage, a lytic phage targeting Salmonella enterica serovar Typhi's Vi polysaccharide capsule, along with other Vi-specific phages (ViI, ViII, ViIII-VII) with different morphologies (Myoviridae, Siphoviridae, Podoviridae). These phages were used to identify bacterial genes involved in Vi expression and phage susceptibility.
